calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-14-2022 Vacated

Defendant Ramon Garcia Roofing, Inc.'S Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar Jun-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RAMON GARCIA ROOFING, INC.'S Motion To Set Aside Default.

Ramon Garcia Roofing, Inc.'s motion to set aside default is granted. It is a policy of California's courts to decide cases on their merits. Garcia filed his motion two months after default and his counsel requested the set aside a month before that. (See CCP 473.) "[M]istake, inadvertence, surprise or excusable neglect" is shown. (Id.)

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
